---
title: "e_cigarette_data"
author: "Elizabeth Greenan"
date: "2026-03-28"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

The below code uses the haven library to read the XPT file.

```{r}

library(haven)

e_cig_data <- read_xpt("data/LLCP2024.XPT ")

head(e_cig_data)

```

The next chunk of code writes this as a CSV file. I included the row.names = False

```{r}

write.csv(e_cig_data, "data/LLCP2024.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
